notes: Adds batch-mode Trace raw Excel to Trace_Master.parquet merging.
Streams existing Parquet rows and raw export batches through a temporary Parquet writer instead of holding every raw file in memory.
Keeps the Trace raw import ledger so already-imported files are skipped.
Uses row-hash deduplication across streamed batches, ignoring audit/source columns.
Reduces peak memory and avoids Excel row-limit failures for large historical merges.
